backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality implemented yet.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: landing page, navigation menu, dashboard pages, and visual theme with warm color scheme avoiding blue/purple.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using grayscale values (no hue).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the LAN Hub application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home, Dashboard, Network Status, and Settings pages within a Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, current year, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper providing consistent structure with Navigation header, Outlet for page content, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky header navigation with logo, app title, and menu items (Home, Dashboard, Network Status, Settings) with active state highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook for managing ICP backend actor instances with authentication support via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for future React Query hooks when backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind styles with OKLCH color system using warm earthy tones (60° hue) and teal/green accents (160-180° hue) for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point setting up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and rendering the App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying network statistics (connected devices, bandwidth, storage, uptime) in a card grid, network overview details, and recent device activity with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section featuring network background image, welcome message, call-to-action buttons, and feature cards highlighting local network benefits (security, speed, availability).
frontend/src/pages/NetworkStatus.tsx: Network status page showing real-time performance metrics (download/upload speed, signal strength, latency) with progress bars and a list of connected devices with IP/MAC addresses.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page with configuration forms for network settings (name, IP range, gateway, DHCP), notification preferences, and toggle switches for various alert types.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography with Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, container settings, border radius variables, and custom animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting the LAN Hub application with completed features (landing page, navigation, dashboard, visual theme), image requirements, and architectural notes about LAN deployment.
